title: Level Z - Farmer's Delight
description: A LevelZ Addon for the Farmer's Delight mod.
body:
A LevelZ Addon for the Farmer's Delight mod.

This addon adds level requirements for Farmer's Delight knives, pot and cutting board to fit seemlessly with LevelZ. This way you can add the Farmer's Delight mod to your RPG modpacks without worrying about people skipping progression.

Did I miss something or do you have any further suggestions for other mods I should make compatible? Follow the discord link and let me know!
